name: The Kashmir Files: Unreported
overview: The series captures the story of Kashmir, highlighting the events leading up to the mass exodus of Kashmiri Pandits in the 90s, the abrogation of Article 370, and its impact on the former state.

trailers.title: The Kashmir Files: Unreported | Official Trailer | Vivek A, Pallavi J | A ZEE5 Original| Coming Soon
